name: 2q37_brachydactyly_mental_retardation
description: 2q37 deletion syndrome (Albright hereditary osteodystrophy-like) — terminal/interstitial deletions of distal 2q37 affecting HDAC4. Most deletions are non-recurrent in size but subtelomeric SD blocks at 2q37.3 do mediate a fraction of recurrent breakpoints. Phenotype: brachydactyly type E, intellectual disability, autism, short stature.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD cluster (~50-200 kb blocks); critical gene HDAC4 lies at 2q37.3 ~239.0-239.3 Mb. Most cases involve haploinsufficiency of HDAC4 and adjacent PASK, KIF1A.
